hero_headlines: Streamline Invoice Approvals for Procurement Staff.
hero_subheads: Dashboard to track your invoice status.
Keep your agency’s cash flow healthy.
value_props: Weekly reminders help procurement staff stay on track.
Manual entry ensures accuracy in invoice approvals.
A clear dashboard simplifies status monitoring.
Reduce late payments with timely notifications.
Designed for small marketing agencies with limited invoices.
feature_bullets: Manual entry of invoice approval status for clarity.
Receive weekly reminders to prevent delays.
Dashboard provides a clear view of invoice statuses.
Simple tracking tailored for small marketing agencies.
Focus on approvals, not on chasing emails.
cta_variants: Join other procurement staff in improving workflows.
Sign up for simple invoice management.
